sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id UInt64, name String, value Nullable(Float64), created DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT count(value) FROM test_data WHERE value = ALL (SELECT DISTINCT value FROM test_data WHERE name LIKE 'A%');
SELECT count(DISTINCT name) FROM test_data WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE value > (SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_data));
SELECT id, count(*) FROM test_data GROUP BY id HAVING count(*) = ALL (SELECT count(*) FROM (SELECT name FROM test_data));
SELECT name, count(value) FROM test_data GROUP BY name HAVING count(value) > (SELECT count(DISTINCT id) FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL);
SELECT count(*) FROM (SELECT name FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL AND name = ALL (SELECT name FROM test_data WHERE created >= '2023-01-01 00:00:00' AND created < '2023-01-02 00:00:00'));
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, value FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT count(DISTINCT value) FROM (SELECT value FROM temp_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL AND value = ALL (SELECT value FROM test_data WHERE value < 50.0));
SELECT count(value) FROM test_data WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE created > '2023-01-01 00:00:00') AND value IS NOT NULL;
